headline: Senate Funds DHS TSA SLAY 💸✈️ but ICE Cucked 🚫🍆 Chaos Ends?
text:
US Senate 🏛️🔥 pulling an ALL-NIGHTER 😴💤 VOTE 🗳️ to END the 40-DAY GOV SHUTDOWN HELL 🔥⏳ – funding THICC DHS 🛡️💰 (minus ICE deportation daddies 🚫🇲🇽) to SLICE THOSE AIRPORT LINES 📏😩 like a hot knife through TSA butter 🧈✈️! Travelers been QUEUING HOURS ⏰😭 at checkpoints, frazzled AF 💦😵‍💫 – BBC reporter in Houston 🌵✈️ waited 2 HOURS 🕐 just to hit ANOTHER ESCALATOR TRAP 🛗😂 winding like a bad acid trip! Only 1/3 to 50% TSA lanes OPEN 🚪🚫 cuz 50K AGENTS 😤 working NO PAY 💸🚫 since Feb – hundreds QUITTING 👋💨 like rats from a sinking shutdown ship 🐀🚢!

Dems 🐴🔵 held out like boss bitches 👸🚫 for ICE REFORMS 📜 – NO BLANK CHECK 💵❌ for 'lawless' raids after Renee Good & Alex Pretti murders 💥🩸 in Minneapolis ❄️🇺🇸! Demands? DITCH ICE MASKS 😷🚫, BAN RACIAL PROFILING 👮‍♂️🚫, JUDICIAL WARRANTS 🧑‍⚖️📜 before busting into cribs 🏠🔓! Senate STRIPPED ICE & border bros 🚫🛡️ for UNANIMOUS W 🤝🔥 early Friday AM 🌅 – now House GOP 🏠🔴 gotta PASS it or CHAOS REIGNS 👑😈!

Trump 🍊👑 dropping EXEC ORDER BOMB 💣📜 on Truth Social 🐦💨: 'IMMEDIATELY PAY TSA DADDIES 💰✈️!' Senate Majority Leader John Thune 🧔📢 ROASTING 👊: 'Dems REFUSED deal 😤🚫, so GOP piecemeal FUNDING DHS like budget Uber Eats 🍔📦 – NOT IDEAL but SLAYS airport apocalypse 🧟‍♂️✈️!' Chuck Schumer 🤓🔵 spilling tea ☕: Package hooks TSA 👮‍♂️✈️, Coast Guard ⛵🛡️, FEMA disaster daddies 🌀🏠 – but NO LOVE for ICE goons 🤡🚔 after those fatal shoots 💥🩸!

Airport DIRECTOR Jim Szczesniak 📞 spilling deets: Houston running SKELETON CREW 👻🚪 – lines SNAKING like a MAGA rally gone wrong 🐍😩! Hope this bill MOONS THROUGH HOUSE 🚀📈 to END TRAVEL NIGHTMARE 😰🛫 – no more 'WHERE'S MY FLIGHT' MELTDOWNS 📱😭! Trump stepping in like CAPTAIN AMERICA 🦸‍♂️🛡️ to rescue skies, but Dems say 'WE WON by Cucking ICE 🍑🚫!' Shutdown saga = PURE DRAMA 👗💥, airports breathing again 🌬️✈️ – but House vote LFG or BACK TO LINES 📏😤‼️
